R0147.title: Payment Institution Regulatory Compliance Risk
R0147.definition: Compliance risks faced by payment institutions due to regulatory data quality issues and failure to meet penetrating supervision requirements.
R0147.description: As regulatory authorities implement penetrating supervision and payment business function supervision on payment institutions, payment institutions need to provide high-quality regulatory data. Data quality issues, non-compliance with validation rules (4200+ rules), improper data desensitization, etc., may all lead to compliance risks and regulatory penalties. Regulatory requirements have been further tightened in 2026.

references.title: Strict Implementation of Penetrating Supervision and Payment Business Function Supervision for Payment Institutions
